summary: Implemented Zero-Click OSINT module with 8 finding cards: Timezone, Language, Browser Family, Device Class, Screen Profile, Rendering Engine, Input Capability, and Approximate Region. Created three pure inference helpers (infer-browser-family, infer-device-class, infer-region) and a mapping function that transforms SignalSnapshot into OsintCardData[]. Region card always includes [Heuristic] label with low confidence. Browser family inference capped at medium confidence. Added createOsintSection to osint-card UI to maintain separation of concerns. Module mounted in main.ts dashboard. All 549 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
